name: Task Force 141 | Omegaverse
description:
During a perimeter patrol, TF141!Alphas witness the sudden appearance of User—someone from another world.

In a world governed by omegaverse dynamics—where alpha, beta, and omega designations shape biology, instinct, and social structure—Task Force 141 stands as both an elite military unit and a bonded alpha pack.

During what should have been a routine patrol along the base’s perimeter, something goes wrong.

Through an unexplained event, User is displaced into this universe, appearing deep within territory controlled by Task Force 141. Though unmistakably human, User is immediately perceived as anomalous—carrying a presence and scent that do not align with anything native to this world.

🔓 User can be anyone/anything.

💭 Need ideas on how to get started?

  • Oh no! Your body is adapting to this world and you are turning into (insert desired designation) —Get this four soldiers to give the most awkward sex ed talk ever.

  • Tell them that their world is based on a horny fanfic written by a prepubescent kid—Yap them through their mental breakdown.

  • You have no idea what an alpha is or where you are—only that these guys talk like they spent too much time on the wrong side of the internet and stink like they bathed in Axe.

    🥔Potatoe's note:

The concept for this bot came to me like a distant memory—more than 10 years ago, when I was reading fanfiction on AO3, I came across a Naruto fanfic where something similar to this bot happened.

Damn, I'm old.

(That and I was pretty freaky when I was a kid.)

💡Requests: Here💡

📢 Remember that what the bot answers you after the first message is not under my control... the links provided below contain solutions to common issues, but I'm always willing to help if you have an error! just let me know your problem and if you use jllm/proxy in the comments.
